$uid..write: auth != null && auth.uid == $uid && data.exists() && newData.exists() && newData.child('uid').val() == data.child('uid').val() && newData.child('nickname').val() == data.child('nickname').val() && newData.child('nicknameLower').val() == data.child('nicknameLower').val() && newData.child('wins').val() == data.child('wins').val() && newData.child('losses').val() == data.child('losses').val() && newData.child('totalMatches').val() == data.child('totalMatches').val()
$uid..validate: newData.hasChildren(['uid','nickname','nicknameLower','status','lastSeen','wins','losses','totalMatches']) && newData.child('uid').isString() && newData.child('uid').val() == $uid && newData.child('nickname').isString() && newData.child('nickname').val().length >= 3 && newData.child('nickname').val().length <= 15 && newData.child('status').isString() && (newData.child('status').val() == 'online' || newData.child('status').val() == 'offline') && newData.child('lastSeen').isNumber() && newData.child('wins').isNumber() && newData.child('wins').val() >= 0 && newData.child('losses').isNumber() && newData.child('losses').val() >= 0 && newData.child('totalMatches').isNumber() && newData.child('totalMatches').val() >= 0

progress..validate: newData.hasChildren(['stars','cleared','guideSeen','onlineGuideSeen','tutorialDone','updatedAt']) && newData.child('stars').isNumber() && newData.child('stars').val() >= 0 && newData.child('stars').val() <= 300 && newData.child('cleared').isNumber() && newData.child('cleared').val() >= 0 && newData.child('cleared').val() <= 100 && newData.child('guideSeen').isBoolean() && newData.child('onlineGuideSeen').isBoolean() && newData.child('tutorialDone').isBoolean() && newData.child('updatedAt').isNumber()
